name: ATI Technologies Inc.
description: ATI Technologies Inc. was a major Canadian semiconductor technology corporation that specialized in the development of graphics processing units (GPUs) and chipsets. Founded in 1985, the company pioneered the personal computer graphics industry with its popular Radeon line of graphics cards, which competed directly with NVIDIA's GeForce series. ATI also developed graphics chips for gaming consoles, handheld devices, and digital televisions. In 2006, ATI Technologies was acquired by Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), which eventually retired the ATI brand name in 2010 in favor of the AMD brand.
